title: Connect Google Drive to Claude (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to connect Google Drive to Claude using the platform's connector feature. Users can link their Google Drive directly to enable Claude to access and analyze files without repeated uploading or manual copy-pasting.
